title: Smoky Syrian Kielbasa Skillet
description: A flavorful Syrian dish featuring charred kielbasa and fluffy double-fry potatoes, perfect for a brunch mood. This recipe is low-fat friendly and serves as a great option for a weeknight meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced kielbasa and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the kielbasa from the skillet and set aside.
Add the diced potatoes to the skillet and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked kielbasa back to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables and spices.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer the mixture for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve the smoky Syrian kielbasa skillet hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
